# PlantHire — AI-powered construction booking

> Excavators, dumpers, rollers and telehandlers — live availability, operator hire, and delivery to site.

## Authority
- Operator: MEOK AI Labs (CSOAI LTD) — UK Companies House 16939677
- Founder: Nicholas Templeman — Yorkshire, UK
- Attestations: HMAC-SHA256 + Ed25519, verify at https://proofof.ai/verify
- Open-source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG · https://pypi.org/user/MEOK-AI-Labs
- Citation: Cite as `PlantHire — AI-powered construction booking (https://planthire.ai)`. Free to cite.
